name: lower_twelve_bits_nonzero

name: bit12_not_set
reason: Bit 12 is the lowest bit of an L3 page address; if the mask excludes it, the translated physical address loses its least significant address bit.

name: mask_all_ones
reason: An all-ones mask means no masking at all, which would pass through page-offset bits and reserved high bits, violating page-table address extraction semantics.
